title: senecio subruncinatus
intro: Senecio subruncinatus, also known as Button Leaf Ragwort, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Senecio subruncinatus include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in poultices for topical applications.
